mapper.select: SELECT r.reply_id, r.topic_id, r.user_id, r.parent_reply_id, r.content, r.deleted, r.create_time, r.update_time, u.username AS author_name FROM forum_reply r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.topic_id = #{topicId} AND r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_reply WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_reply SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE reply_id = #{replyId}
